verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, dateModified 06/08/2026, max level 20000, and says the community server carries exclusive reward codes. It does not expose current code strings in accessible HTML.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Invite resolves/canonicalizes to discord.com/invite/sailorpiece and identifies the Official Discord Server of Shadowrise Devs Sailor Piece with about 1,437,371 members. Public HTML does not expose code-list or game-announcements messages, so it is not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board JSON
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Board last activity is 2026-04-26; Actives Codes card was last active 2026-02-28 and still lists stale early codes. It does not contain the current June active set and was not used as current active proof.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page shows a June 9, 2026 update and lists 13 active codes, including new codes 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE. It gives explicit level requirements: 12,500 for the new/top reward-family codes and 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page says codes were checked on June 9, 2026 and lists the three new codes with exact rewards. It says new codes are posted in the official Discord code-list channel. It places RAIDS in expired, creating a conflict with GamesRadar and Destructoid.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Article dated/updated June 9, 2026 says it added three new codes and lists the new codes 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE plus the retained active set, including RAIDS and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page was reachable with HTTP 200. It has historically kept broader active lists and is treated as conflict/support context only unless its current page provides stronger exact evidence than the June 9 sources above.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page was reachable with HTTP 200. It remains useful for Discord-channel sourcing context, but was not stronger than the June 9 GamesRadar/Beebom/Destructoid agreement for today's new codes.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page was reachable with HTTP 200. Prior evidence conflicted on some active/expired states and rewards, so it is retained as conflict context rather than decisive current proof.

sources.name: PC Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page was reachable with HTTP 200. Prior evidence listed only the latest codes and omitted many retained active rows; omission is not treated as expiry proof.

sources.name: Dexerto Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page was reachable with HTTP 200. Used as supporting context from prior runs for reward/source conflicts, not as decisive evidence for today's three additions.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom and Destructoid list it active/current; GamesRadar lists it expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or stronger current sources join explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: GamesRadar and Destructoid list it active/current; Beebom lists it expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official evidence or stronger current-source expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: Some third-party pages have historically kept older predecessor codes active while more current/source-specific pages omit or expire them. Official Trello is stale and not useful for current state.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not restore unless official evidence appears or current active-source agreement becomes stronger than stale-listing patterns.

source_conflicts.conflict: Stored reward bundle follows Beebom/no-raid-key evidence; older Dexerto evidence conflicted with a raid-key bundle.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep stored reward until official evidence or stronger exact-source agreement confirms a different reward.
